title: sida haenkeana
intro: Sida haenkeana, also known as the Haenke's fanpetals, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sida haenkeana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Sida haenkeana is typically prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
